CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT json, distinctJSONPaths(json) AS paths FROM test_json;
WITH (SELECT max(json) FROM test_json) AS max_json SELECT distinctJSONPaths(max_json);
CREATE TABLE test_json_2(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT distinctJSONPaths(json) FROM (SELECT json FROM test_json UNION ALL SELECT json FROM test_json_2) AS combined_json;
WITH (SELECT DISTINCT json FROM test_json WHERE json IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_json SELECT distinctJSONPaths(non_null_json) FROM non_null_json;
CREATE TABLE nested_test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT distinctJSONPaths(json) AS paths FROM (SELECT json FROM test_json INTERSECT SELECT json FROM test_json_2) AS intersected_json;
